checks.name: schema_completeness
checks.detail: All required payload fields present with rich design_highlights and notification channels

checks.name: flow_integrity
checks.detail: 3 flows (daily briefing with 15 nodes, anomaly recovery with 9 nodes, error recovery with 8 nodes) — all properly connected

checks.name: trigger_validity
checks.detail: Daily schedule at 8AM (0 8 * * *) — valid cron matching the described daily workflow

checks.name: connector_role_alignment
checks.detail: mixpanel (analytics), slack (chat_messaging), notion (knowledge_base) — all roles valid with builtins

checks.name: adoption_question_fitness
checks.detail: 5 adoption_questions added covering slack channels, Notion DB, Mixpanel project, and anomaly threshold

checks.name: default_value_coverage
checks.detail: Slack channels have defaults (#product-analytics, #product-alerts). Anomaly threshold defaults to 15%.

checks.name: prompt_quality
checks.detail: Identity 83w, instructions 600w+ with 16 numbered steps across 5 phases, tool guidance with specific Mixpanel/Slack/Notion API endpoints, detailed example briefing, comprehensive error handling

checks.name: safety_scan
checks.detail: 0 critical findings. Read-only operations against Mixpanel; write to Slack and Notion only.

dimensions.name: Prompt Completeness
dimensions.rationale: Identity 83w, instructions cover 5 phases with 16 numbered steps totaling 600+ words, tool guidance includes specific Mixpanel API endpoints (/segmentation, /funnels, /export), Slack Block Kit patterns, and Notion page creation. Detailed example with formatted table output. Error handling covers Mixpanel, Slack, Notion, and data integrity issues.

dimensions.name: Tool-Prompt Alignment
dimensions.rationale: http_request used for all 3 APIs with specific endpoint documentation. file_read/file_write for local baselines. All tools in suggested_tools are referenced in prompt.

dimensions.name: Trigger Coherence
dimensions.rationale: Single daily 8AM trigger perfectly matches the 'morning briefing' workflow. Schedule aligns with the described 'start your day with product health' value proposition.

dimensions.name: Connector Coverage
dimensions.rationale: All 3 connectors (Mixpanel, Slack, Notion) have full definitions with credential fields, setup instructions, related tools, API base URLs, and roles.

dimensions.name: Memory Design
dimensions.rationale: Agent memory stores daily metric snapshots for WoW comparisons. Local baselines file tracks rolling averages. Anomaly history enables recovery tracking across runs.

dimensions.name: Error Handling
dimensions.rationale: Per-service error handling: Mixpanel (401, 429, 5xx, timeout), Slack (channel_not_found, message too long, not_in_channel), Notion (404, validation, total failure). Data integrity guards for null/impossible values. Graceful degradation with stale data labeling.

dimensions.name: Use Case Fidelity
dimensions.rationale: 3 flows cover every aspect: daily briefing (main workflow), anomaly recovery tracking, and API failure recovery. All prompt steps map to flow nodes.

dimensions.name: Value Clarity
dimensions.rationale: Extremely clear value: daily product health briefing with anomaly detection, plain-English insights, and historical trend tracking. Replaces manual Mixpanel dashboard checks.

dimensions.name: Execution Feasibility
dimensions.rationale: All connectors have builtins. Mixpanel API, Slack, and Notion are all standard. However, Mixpanel API Secret and Project ID setup requires some technical knowledge.

dimensions.name: Differentiation
dimensions.rationale: Multi-window comparison (vs goals, 7d avg, 30d avg, WoW), anomaly detection with threshold-based flagging, health status system, and recovery tracking go well beyond simple data fetching.

dimensions.name: Variable Necessity
dimensions.rationale: All 5 adoption questions are needed: Slack channels for briefings vs alerts, Notion DB for logging, Mixpanel project for data source, and anomaly threshold for sensitivity tuning.

dimensions.name: Default Quality
dimensions.rationale: Good defaults for Slack channels and anomaly threshold (15%). Mixpanel project ID and Notion DB ID require user input but that is unavoidable.

issues: No adoption_questions existed — connectors need user-specific configuration for Mixpanel project, Slack channels, Notion database, and anomaly threshold

template: Added 5 adoption_questions: slack_briefing_channel, slack_alert_channel, notion_database_id, mixpanel_project_id, daily_budget_threshold
